name: dev-kit
description: dev-kit marketplace: consolidated SDD skills, agents, and commands split into lane-scoped plugins — install core everywhere, add lanes per project

plugins.name: dev-kit-core
plugins.description: Core SDD toolkit: process discipline, SDD spine, lens-based plan review, dev-loop workflows, lifecycle agents, gates, and commands (always install)

plugins.name: dev-kit-web
plugins.description: Web frontend knowledge packs: React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, TypeScript, Playwright, Shopify, WordPress, Electron

plugins.name: dev-kit-mobile
plugins.description: Mobile knowledge packs: Flutter, React Native, Swift, Kotlin

plugins.name: dev-kit-backend
plugins.description: Backend and language knowledge packs: Java/Spring, Python, Node, Go, Rust, PHP, Ruby, .NET, Elixir, SQL/Postgres, API/GraphQL/microservices design

plugins.name: dev-kit-data-ai
plugins.description: Data and AI packs plus the 4 AI-lane agents: RAG, LLM architecture, prompt engineering, ML/MLOps, NLP, data engineering, evals

plugins.name: dev-kit-infra
plugins.description: Infrastructure knowledge packs: Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, cloud architecture, Azure, networking, SRE, monitoring, PowerShell, Microsoft ops

plugins.name: dev-kit-specialized
plugins.description: Specialized domain packs: embedded, games, Salesforce, CLI/MCP/devtools, Slack, Atlassian, and niche industries (blockchain, fintech, payments, healthcare, legal, SEO)

plugins.name: dev-kit-product
plugins.description: Product analytics and compliance: A/B testing, cohort analysis, growth loops, GDPR/CCPA, HIPAA
